name: Invitation Homes Inc.
business: Invitation Homes is a leading owner and operator of single-family homes for lease. As of December 31, 2025, it wholly owns 86,192 homes for lease, jointly owns 8,006 homes for lease, and provides professional third-party property and asset management services for an additional 15,866 homes.

exposures.sentence: Invitation Homes is a leading owner and operator of single-family homes for lease, offering residents high-quality homes in sought-after neighborhoods across the United States.
Security breaches and other disruptions could compromise our information systems and expose us to liability, which would cause our business and reputation to suffer.

catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2026, we acquired ResiBuilt Homes, LLC (ResiBuilt), a leading fee homebuilder specializing in single-family rental communities with expertise in land development and construction general contracting across high-growth Southeast markets.

In May 2025, we launched a developer lending program to selectively provide financing to experienced, successful, and relationship-driven homebuilders for the development of new single-family home communities that may serve as future acquisition opportunities.
